title: Caribbean
writer: Ellery H. Clark, Frank L. Moss, Edward Ludwig
actors: John Payne, Arlene Dahl, Cedric Hardwicke
plot: Francis Barclay, a former member of the British Admiralty, who was captured in the early 1700s and sold into slavery by Andrew MacAllister, and forced into piracy, enlists the aid of Dick Lindsay, to help him invade MacAllister's ...
